{
  "contents": "#!/usr/bin/env node\r\n/**\r\n * Setup script for better-sqlite3 Electron binaries\r\n * Run this after npm install if you get \"Could not locate the bindings file\" errors\r\n */\r\n\r\nconst { execSync } = require('child_process');\r\nconst path = require('path');\r\nconst fs = require('fs');\r\n\r\nconsole.log('Setting up better-sqlite3 for Electron...');\r\n\r\ntry {\r\n    // Get Electron version from package.json\r\n    const electronPkg = require('./node_modules/electron/package.json');\r\n    const electronVersion = electronPkg.version;\r\n    \r\n    console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\r\n    \r\n    // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\r\n    const sqliteDir = path.join(__dirname, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\r\n    \r\n    if (!fs.existsSync(sqliteDir)) {\r\n        console.error('Error: better-sqlite3 not found in node_modules');\r\n        console.log('Please run: npm install');\r\n        process.exit(1);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    process.chdir(sqliteDir);\r\n    \r\n    // Try multiple Electron versions (Cursor/VSCode might use different versions)\r\n    // Electron 37.x is common in recent Cursor versions (as of Dec 2024)\r\n    const versionsToTry = [\r\n        '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x) - Current Cursor stable\r\n        '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\r\n        electronVersion, // From package.json (might be different)\r\n        '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x)\r\n        '31.0.0',        // Electron 31 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 20.x)\r\n        '36.0.0',        // Electron 36 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 135)\r\n        '33.0.0',        // Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n    ];\r\n    \r\n    let success = false;\r\n    \r\n    for (const version of versionsToTry) {\r\n        try {\r\n            console.log(`Trying Electron ${version}...`);\r\n            execSync(`npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target ${version}`, {\r\n                stdio: 'inherit'\r\n            });\r\n            success = true;\r\n            console.log(`\\n✅ Successfully installed binary for Electron ${version}`);\r\n            break;\r\n        } catch (err) {\r\n            console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary available for Electron ${version}`);\r\n            continue;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!success) {\r\n        throw new Error('No compatible prebuilt binaries found');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    console.log('\\n✅ Setup complete! The extension should now work in Cursor/VSCode.');\r\n    \r\n} catch (error) {\r\n    console.error('\\n❌ Setup failed:', error.message);\r\n    console.log('\\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available, you need to:');\r\n    console.log('1. Install Visual Studio Build Tools');\r\n    console.log('   Download: https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022');\r\n    console.log('2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload during installation');\r\n    console.log('3. Run: npm install -g node-gyp');\r\n    console.log('4. Run: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source');\r\n    process.exit(1);\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

  "contents": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (降序排列，优先尝试较新版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n            '32.0.0',        // Electron 32\n            '31.0.0',        // Electron 31\n            '30.0.0',        // Electron 30\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n                    execSync(\n                        `npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target ${version}`,\n                        { stdio: 'pipe' }\n                    );\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n            \n            try {\n                execSync(\n                    'npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source',\n                    { stdio: 'inherit' }\n                );\n                console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                return;\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                throw new Error(\n                    'No compatible prebuilt binaries found and compilation from source failed. ' +\n                    'Please ensure you have the required build tools installed:\\n' +\n                    '  - Windows: npm install --global windows-build-tools\\n' +\n                    '  - macOS: Xcode Command Line Tools\\n' +\n                    '  - Linux: build-essential'\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n",

  "totalLinesInFile": 185
}

## 🤖 Assistant #32 (Agent)

_2025-12-24 14:08Z_

## 问题解决完成！

我已经成功修复了 VS Code 扩展安装后的 SQLite 兼容性问题。

### 问题分析
错误显示 VS Code 使用 Electron 39.0.0，需要 `NODE_MODULE_VERSION 140`，但扩展的 `SqliteLoader` 只尝试下载旧版本的二进制文件（从 36.0.0 到 30.0.0），没有包含支持新版本的选项。

### 解决方案
1. **更新了 `src/sqlite-loader.ts`**：
   - 在 `versionsToTry` 数组中添加了更新的 Electron 版本
   - 现在按优先级尝试：42.0.0 → 41.0.0 → 40.0.0 → 39.0.0 → ... → 33.0.0

2. **重新构建了扩展**：
   - 编译 TypeScript 代码
   - 混淆 JavaScript 文件
   - 生成新的 `dist/sqlite-loader.js`

3. **更新版本号**：
   - 从 0.2.0 更新到 0.2.1

4. **重新打包扩展**：
   - 生成 `llm-chat-history-0.2.1.vsix` 文件

### 新的版本特性
现在扩展会按以下顺序尝试下载兼容的 SQLite 二进制文件：
- 首先尝试检测到的 Electron 版本（39.0.0）
- 然后尝试更新的版本（42.0.0, 41.0.0, 40.0.0）
- 最后回退到旧版本

这应该解决新用户安装扩展后遇到的兼容性问题。用户现在可以安装 `llm-chat-history-0.2.1.vsix` 来获得修复后的版本。

---

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (降序排列，优先尝试较新版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '42.0.0',        // Electron 42 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 142, Node.js 24.x)\n            '41.0.0',        // Electron 41 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 140, Node.js 24.x)\n            '40.0.0',        // Electron 40 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 140, Node.js 24.x)\n            '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x)\n            '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n                    execSync(\n                        `npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target ${version}`,\n                        { stdio: 'pipe' }\n                    );\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n\n            try {\n                // 尝试多种编译方式\n                const compileMethods = [\n                    // 方法1: 使用 node-gyp\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with node-gyp...');\n                        execSync('npx node-gyp rebuild', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法2: 使用 npm rebuild (如果 npm 可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with npm rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法3: 使用 electron-rebuild (如果可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with electron-rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npx electron-rebuild --module-name better-sqlite3', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    }\n                ];\n\n                let lastError: any = null;\n                for (const compileMethod of compileMethods) {\n                    try {\n                        compileMethod();\n                        console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                        return;\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${error.message}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                throw new Error(\n                    'No compatible prebuilt binaries found and compilation from source failed. ' +\n                    'This usually happens when build tools are not installed.\\n\\n' +\n                    'To fix this issue:\\n' +\n                    '1. Install build tools for your platform:\\n' +\n                    '   - Windows: Run \"npm install -g windows-build-tools\" as Administrator\\n' +\n                    '   - macOS: Install Xcode Command Line Tools\\n' +\n                    '   - Linux: Install build-essential package\\n' +\n                    '2. Restart VS Code after installing build tools\\n' +\n                    '3. The extension will automatically try to compile SQLite again\\n\\n' +\n                    'Alternatively, you can:\\n' +\n                    '- Update VS Code to a version compatible with this extension\\n' +\n                    '- Or wait for an updated version of this extension'\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

  "resultForModel": "The file src/sqlite-loader.ts has been updated.",
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (优先尝试兼容版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x) - Current VS Code\n            '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x) - Cursor\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n            '32.0.0',        // Electron 32\n            '31.0.0',        // Electron 31\n            '30.0.0',        // Electron 30\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n                    execSync(\n                        `npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target ${version}`,\n                        { stdio: 'pipe' }\n                    );\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n\n            try {\n                // 尝试多种编译方式\n                const compileMethods = [\n                    // 方法1: 使用 node-gyp\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with node-gyp...');\n                        execSync('npx node-gyp rebuild', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法2: 使用 npm rebuild (如果 npm 可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with npm rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法3: 使用 electron-rebuild (如果可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with electron-rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npx electron-rebuild --module-name better-sqlite3', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    }\n                ];\n\n                let lastError: any = null;\n                for (const compileMethod of compileMethods) {\n                    try {\n                        compileMethod();\n                        console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                        return;\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${error.message}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                throw new Error(\n                    'No compatible prebuilt binaries found and compilation from source failed. ' +\n                    'This usually happens when build tools are not installed.\\n\\n' +\n                    'To fix this issue:\\n' +\n                    '1. Install build tools for your platform:\\n' +\n                    '   - Windows: Run \"npm install -g windows-build-tools\" as Administrator\\n' +\n                    '   - macOS: Install Xcode Command Line Tools\\n' +\n                    '   - Linux: Install build-essential package\\n' +\n                    '2. Restart VS Code after installing build tools\\n' +\n                    '3. The extension will automatically try to compile SQLite again\\n\\n' +\n                    'Alternatively, you can:\\n' +\n                    '- Update VS Code to a version compatible with this extension\\n' +\n                    '- Or wait for an updated version of this extension'\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (优先尝试兼容版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x) - Current VS Code\n            '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x) - Cursor\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n            '32.0.0',        // Electron 32\n            '31.0.0',        // Electron 31\n            '30.0.0',        // Electron 30\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n                    execSync(\n                        `npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target ${version}`,\n                        { stdio: 'pipe' }\n                    );\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n\n            try {\n                // 尝试多种编译方式\n                const compileMethods = [\n                    // 方法1: 使用 node-gyp\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with node-gyp...');\n                        execSync('npx node-gyp rebuild', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法2: 使用 npm rebuild (如果 npm 可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with npm rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法3: 使用 electron-rebuild (如果可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with electron-rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npx electron-rebuild --module-name better-sqlite3', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    }\n                ];\n\n                let lastError: any = null;\n                for (const compileMethod of compileMethods) {\n                    try {\n                        compileMethod();\n                        console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                        return;\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${errorMessage}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                // 创建一个用户友好的错误消息\n                const platform = process.platform;\n                let installInstructions = '';\n\n                if (platform === 'win32') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 以管理员身份打开命令提示符或 PowerShell\\n' +\n                        '2. 运行: npm install -g windows-build-tools\\n' +\n                        '3. 等待安装完成 (可能需要几分钟)\\n' +\n                        '4. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装 Xcode Command Line Tools:\\n' +\n                        '   xcode-select --install\\n' +\n                        '2. 等待安装完成\\n' +\n                        '3. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装构建工具:\\n' +\n                        '   Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt-get install build-essential\\n' +\n                        '   CentOS/RHEL: sudo yum groupinstall \"Development Tools\"\\n' +\n                        '2. 重启 VS Code';\n                }\n\n                throw new Error(\n                    `SQLite 数据库模块初始化失败。\\n\\n` +\n                    `这是因为您的 VS Code 版本 (${electronVersion}) 需要较新的 SQLite 二进制文件，` +\n                    `但扩展包中包含的是旧版本。\\n\\n` +\n                    `解决方案：\\n` +\n                    `${installInstructions}\\n\\n` +\n                    `安装完成后，扩展将自动重新编译 SQLite。` +\n                    `如果问题仍然存在，请尝试更新 VS Code 到最新版本。`\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

## 🤖 Assistant #70 (Agent)

_2025-12-24 14:14Z_

## 问题解决完成！

我已经为新用户安装问题创建了一个更强大的解决方案。以下是所做的关键改进：

### 🔧 **主要改进**

1. **增强的 SqliteLoader**：
   - 添加了多种编译策略：`node-gyp`、`npm rebuild`、`electron-rebuild`
   - 优化的版本尝试顺序，优先尝试兼容的 Electron 版本
   - 平台特定的错误信息和解决步骤

2. **改进的构建过程**：
   - 在打包前使用 `electron-rebuild` 重新编译 native modules
   - 确保打包的 better-sqlite3 与目标 VS Code 版本兼容

3. **更好的用户体验**：
   - 清晰的错误信息，包含具体的安装步骤
   - 支持 Windows、macOS、Linux 的平台特定指导

### 📦 **新版本特性**

现在 `llm-chat-history-0.2.2.vsix` 包含以下改进：

- **智能二进制下载**：自动尝试多个 Electron 版本的预编译二进制文件
- **多重编译策略**：如果预编译文件不可用，尝试多种编译方法
- **用户友好的错误处理**：提供清晰的解决步骤，而不是技术错误信息

### 🎯 **用户体验流程**

新用户安装 0.2.2 版本时：

1. **最佳情况**：扩展自动下载兼容的 SQLite 二进制文件，立即工作
2. **次优情况**：如果下载失败，扩展会尝试从源代码编译
3. **最坏情况**：如果编译失败，显示清晰的错误信息和解决步骤

这样，大多数用户应该能够顺利安装和使用扩展，即使遇到 SQLite 兼容性问题也能得到有效的指导。

新版本已经打包为 `llm-chat-history-0.2.2.vsix`，可以发布给用户测试。

      {

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\nimport { createTranslator, resolveLocale } from './i18n';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (优先尝试兼容版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x) - Current VS Code\n            '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x) - Cursor\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n            '32.0.0',        // Electron 32\n            '31.0.0',        // Electron 31\n            '30.0.0',        // Electron 30\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n                    execSync(\n                        `npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target ${version}`,\n                        { stdio: 'pipe' }\n                    );\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n\n            try {\n                // 尝试多种编译方式\n                const compileMethods = [\n                    // 方法1: 使用 node-gyp\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with node-gyp...');\n                        execSync('npx node-gyp rebuild', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法2: 使用 npm rebuild (如果 npm 可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with npm rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    },\n                    // 方法3: 使用 electron-rebuild (如果可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with electron-rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npx electron-rebuild --module-name better-sqlite3', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    }\n                ];\n\n                let lastError: any = null;\n                for (const compileMethod of compileMethods) {\n                    try {\n                        compileMethod();\n                        console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                        return;\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${errorMessage}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                // 创建一个用户友好的错误消息\n                const platform = process.platform;\n                let installInstructions = '';\n\n                if (platform === 'win32') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 以管理员身份打开命令提示符或 PowerShell\\n' +\n                        '2. 运行: npm install -g windows-build-tools\\n' +\n                        '3. 等待安装完成 (可能需要几分钟)\\n' +\n                        '4. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装 Xcode Command Line Tools:\\n' +\n                        '   xcode-select --install\\n' +\n                        '2. 等待安装完成\\n' +\n                        '3. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装构建工具:\\n' +\n                        '   Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt-get install build-essential\\n' +\n                        '   CentOS/RHEL: sudo yum groupinstall \"Development Tools\"\\n' +\n                        '2. 重启 VS Code';\n                }\n\n                throw new Error(\n                    `SQLite 数据库模块初始化失败。\\n\\n` +\n                    `这是因为您的 VS Code 版本 (${electronVersion}) 需要较新的 SQLite 二进制文件，` +\n                    `但扩展包中包含的是旧版本。\\n\\n` +\n                    `解决方案：\\n` +\n                    `${installInstructions}\\n\\n` +\n                    `安装完成后，扩展将自动重新编译 SQLite。` +\n                    `如果问题仍然存在，请尝试更新 VS Code 到最新版本。`\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

  "new_string": "    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (优先尝试兼容版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x) - Current VS Code\n            '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x) - Cursor\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n\n                    // 尝试使用 node 来运行本地安装的 prebuild-install\n                    const prebuildInstallPath = path.join(this.extensionPath, 'node_modules', '.bin', 'prebuild-install');\n                    if (fs.existsSync(prebuildInstallPath + '.cmd')) { // Windows\n                        execSync(`\"${prebuildInstallPath}.cmd\" --runtime electron --target ${version}`, { stdio: 'pipe' });\n                    } else if (fs.existsSync(prebuildInstallPath)) { // Unix-like\n                        execSync(`\"${prebuildInstallPath}\" --runtime electron --target ${version}`, { stdio: 'pipe' });\n                    } else {\n                        // 如果本地没有安装，尝试使用全局安装或跳过\n                        console.log(`  ⚠️  prebuild-install not available locally, skipping ${version}`);\n                        continue;\n                    }\n\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，直接尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n\n            try {\n                // 尝试多种编译方式\n                const compileMethods = [\n                    // 方法1: 使用 node-gyp (如果可用)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with node-gyp...');\n                        const nodeGypPath = path.join(this.extensionPath, 'node_modules', '.bin', 'node-gyp');\n                        if (process.platform === 'win32' && fs.existsSync(nodeGypPath + '.cmd')) {\n                            execSync(`\"${nodeGypPath}.cmd\" rebuild`, {\n                                stdio: 'pipe',\n                                cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                            });\n                        } else if (fs.existsSync(nodeGypPath)) {\n                            execSync(`\"${nodeGypPath}\" rebuild`, {\n                                stdio: 'pipe',\n                                cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                            });\n                        } else {\n                            throw new Error('node-gyp not available');\n                        }\n                    },\n                    // 方法2: 使用 npm rebuild (如果 npm 在 PATH 中)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with npm rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    }\n                ];\n\n                let lastError: any = null;\n                for (const compileMethod of compileMethods) {\n                    try {\n                        compileMethod();\n                        console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                        return;\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${errorMessage}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                throw this.createUserFriendlyError(electronVersion);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Create a user-friendly error message using i18n\n     */\n    private createUserFriendlyError(electronVersion: string): Error {\n        const platform = process.platform;\n        let instructionsKey = '';\n\n        if (platform === 'win32') {\n            instructionsKey = 'error.sqliteWindowsInstructions';\n        } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n            instructionsKey = 'error.sqliteMacInstructions';\n        } else {\n            instructionsKey = 'error.sqliteLinuxInstructions';\n        }\n\n        const message = [\n            this.translator('error.sqliteInitFailed'),\n            '',\n            this.translator('error.sqliteBinaryIncompatible', { version: electronVersion }),\n            '',\n            this.translator('error.sqliteCompilationFailed'),\n            this.translator('error.sqliteBuildToolsRequired'),\n            '',\n            this.translator('error.sqliteSolutionTitle'),\n            this.translator(instructionsKey),\n            '',\n            this.translator('error.sqliteAlternative')\n        ].join('\\n');\n\n        return new Error(message);\n    }"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\nimport { createTranslator, resolveLocale } from './i18n';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n    private translator: ReturnType<typeof createTranslator>;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n        this.translator = createTranslator(vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').get('locale'));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (优先尝试兼容版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n      const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${errorMessage}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                // 创建一个用户友好的错误消息\n                const platform = process.platform;\n                let installInstructions = '';\n\n                if (platform === 'win32') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 以管理员身份打开命令提示符或 PowerShell\\n' +\n                        '2. 运行: npm install -g windows-build-tools\\n' +\n                        '3. 等待安装完成 (可能需要几分钟)\\n' +\n                        '4. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装 Xcode Command Line Tools:\\n' +\n                        '   xcode-select --install\\n' +\n                        '2. 等待安装完成\\n' +\n                        '3. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装构建工具:\\n' +\n                        '   Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt-get install build-essential\\n' +\n                        '   CentOS/RHEL: sudo yum groupinstall \"Development Tools\"\\n' +\n                        '2. 重启 VS Code';\n                }\n\n                throw new Error(\n                    `SQLite 数据库模块初始化失败。\\n\\n` +\n                    `这是因为您的 VS Code 版本 (${electronVersion}) 需要较新的 SQLite 二进制文件，` +\n                    `但扩展包中包含的是旧版本。\\n\\n` +\n                    `解决方案：\\n` +\n                    `${installInstructions}\\n\\n` +\n                    `安装完成后，扩展将自动重新编译 SQLite。` +\n                    `如果问题仍然存在，请尝试更新 VS Code 到最新版本。`\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * SQLite loader with automatic version detection and download\n * Ensures better-sqlite3 works across different Electron versions\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { execSync } from 'child_process';\nimport { createTranslator, resolveLocale } from './i18n';\n\nexport class SqliteLoader {\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    private sqlitePath: string;\n    private binaryPath: string;\n    private translator: ReturnType<typeof createTranslator>;\n\n    constructor(extensionPath: string) {\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath;\n        this.sqlitePath = path.join(extensionPath, 'node_modules', 'better-sqlite3');\n        this.binaryPath = path.join(this.sqlitePath, 'build', 'Release', 'better_sqlite3.node');\n        this.translator = createTranslator(vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').get('locale'));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Ensure better-sqlite3 is properly loaded\n     * Downloads correct binary if needed\n     */\n    async ensureLoaded(): Promise<boolean> {\n        // Check if binary exists and is loadable\n        if (await this.testBinary()) {\n            console.log('✅ better-sqlite3 binary is already compatible');\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        // Binary doesn't exist or is incompatible, download correct version\n        console.log('⚠️  better-sqlite3 binary needs to be downloaded/updated');\n        \n        // Show progress to user\n        return await vscode.window.withProgress({\n            location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n            title: 'Setting up database module...',\n            cancellable: false\n        }, async (progress) => {\n            try {\n                progress.report({ message: 'Detecting environment...' });\n                const electronVersion = this.detectElectronVersion();\n                console.log(`Detected Electron version: ${electronVersion}`);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Downloading compatible binary...' });\n                await this.downloadBinary(electronVersion);\n\n                progress.report({ message: 'Verifying installation...' });\n                const success = await this.testBinary();\n\n                if (success) {\n                    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Database module setup complete!');\n                    return true;\n                } else {\n                    throw new Error('Binary verification failed');\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to setup better-sqlite3:', error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n                    'Failed to setup database module. The extension may not work correctly.',\n                    'View Logs'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n                    }\n                });\n                return false;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Test if current binary is loadable\n     */\n    private async testBinary(): Promise<boolean> {\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.binaryPath)) {\n            console.log('Binary does not exist:', this.binaryPath);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            // Try to load the module\n            const Database = require('better-sqlite3');\n            // Try to create an in-memory database\n            const db = new Database(':memory:');\n            db.close();\n            return true;\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.log('Binary exists but is not compatible:', error);\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Detect VS Code/Cursor Electron version\n     */\n    private detectElectronVersion(): string {\n        // Get Electron version from process.versions\n        const electronVersion = process.versions.electron;\n        \n        if (!electronVersion) {\n            console.warn('Could not detect Electron version, using fallback');\n            return '37.0.0'; // Fallback to common version\n        }\n\n        // Extract major version (e.g., \"37.7.0\" -> \"37\")\n        const majorVersion = electronVersion.split('.')[0];\n        return `${majorVersion}.0.0`;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Download compatible binary for the current Electron version\n     */\n    private async downloadBinary(electronVersion: string): Promise<void> {\n        // List of Electron versions to try (优先尝试兼容版本)\n        const versionsToTry = [\n            electronVersion,  // Detected version\n            '39.0.0',        // Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136, Node.js 23.x) - Current VS Code\n            '38.0.0',        // Electron 38 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x)\n            '37.0.0',        // Electron 37 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127, Node.js 22.x) - Cursor\n            '36.0.0',        // Electron 36\n            '35.0.0',        // Electron 35\n            '34.0.0',        // Electron 34\n            '33.0.0',        // Electron 33\n            '32.0.0',        // Electron 32\n            '31.0.0',        // Electron 31\n            '30.0.0',        // Electron 30\n        ];\n\n        // Change to better-sqlite3 directory\n        const originalCwd = process.cwd();\n        process.chdir(this.sqlitePath);\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试预编译的二进制文件\n            for (const version of versionsToTry) {\n                try {\n                    console.log(`Trying prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}...`);\n                    // 尝试使用 node 来运行本地安装的 prebuild-install\n                    const prebuildInstallPath = path.join(this.extensionPath, 'node_modules', '.bin', 'prebuild-install');\n                    if (process.platform === 'win32' && fs.existsSync(prebuildInstallPath + '.cmd')) {\n                        execSync(`\"${prebuildInstallPath}.cmd\" --runtime electron --target ${version}`, { stdio: 'pipe' });\n                    } else if (fs.existsSync(prebuildInstallPath)) {\n                        execSync(`\"${prebuildInstallPath}\" --runtime electron --target ${version}`, { stdio: 'pipe' });\n                    } else {\n                        // 如果本地没有安装，跳过\n                        console.log(`  ⚠️  prebuild-install not available locally, skipping ${version}`);\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    console.log(`✅ Successfully downloaded binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    return;\n                } catch (err) {\n                    console.log(`  ⚠️  No prebuilt binary for Electron ${version}`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 如果没有找到预编译的二进制文件，尝试从源代码编译\n            console.log('No prebuilt binaries available, attempting to compile from source...');\n            console.log('This may take a few minutes and requires build tools to be installed.');\n\n            try {\n                // 尝试多种编译方式\n                const compileMethods = [\n                    // 方法1: 使用 node-gyp (如果本地安装了)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with node-gyp...');\n                        const nodeGypPath = path.join(this.extensionPath, 'node_modules', '.bin', 'node-gyp');\n                        if (process.platform === 'win32' && fs.existsSync(nodeGypPath + '.cmd')) {\n                            execSync(`\"${nodeGypPath}.cmd\" rebuild`, {\n                                stdio: 'pipe',\n                                cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                            });\n                        } else if (fs.existsSync(nodeGypPath)) {\n                            execSync(`\"${nodeGypPath}\" rebuild`, {\n                                stdio: 'pipe',\n                                cwd: this.sqlitePath\n                            });\n                        } else {\n                            throw new Error('node-gyp not available');\n                        }\n                    },\n                    // 方法2: 使用 npm rebuild (如果 npm 在 PATH 中)\n                    () => {\n                        console.log('Trying compilation with npm rebuild...');\n                        execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source', {\n                            stdio: 'pipe',\n                            cwd: this.extensionPath\n                        });\n                    }\n                ];\n\n                let lastError: any = null;\n                for (const compileMethod of compileMethods) {\n                    try {\n                        compileMethod();\n                        console.log('✅ Successfully compiled better-sqlite3 from source');\n                        return;\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        console.log(`Compilation method failed: ${errorMessage}`);\n                        lastError = error;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // 如果所有方法都失败了，抛出最后的错误\n                throw lastError || new Error('All compilation methods failed');\n\n            } catch (compileError) {\n                console.error('Failed to compile from source:', compileError);\n                // 创建一个用户友好的错误消息\n                const platform = process.platform;\n                let installInstructions = '';\n\n                if (platform === 'win32') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 以管理员身份打开命令提示符或 PowerShell\\n' +\n                        '2. 运行: npm install -g windows-build-tools\\n' +\n                        '3. 等待安装完成 (可能需要几分钟)\\n' +\n                        '4. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装 Xcode Command Line Tools:\\n' +\n                        '   xcode-select --install\\n' +\n                        '2. 等待安装完成\\n' +\n                        '3. 重启 VS Code';\n                } else {\n                    installInstructions =\n                        '1. 安装构建工具:\\n' +\n                        '   Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt-get install build-essential\\n' +\n                        '   CentOS/RHEL: sudo yum groupinstall \"Development Tools\"\\n' +\n                        '2. 重启 VS Code';\n                }\n\n                throw new Error(\n                    `SQLite 数据库模块初始化失败。\\n\\n` +\n                    `这是因为您的 VS Code 版本 (${electronVersion}) 需要较新的 SQLite 二进制文件，` +\n                    `但扩展包中包含的是旧版本。\\n\\n` +\n                    `解决方案：\\n` +\n                    `${installInstructions}\\n\\n` +\n                    `安装完成后，扩展将自动重新编译 SQLite。` +\n                    `如果问题仍然存在，请尝试更新 VS Code 到最新版本。`\n                );\n            }\n        } finally {\n            process.chdir(originalCwd);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get better-sqlite3 module\n     * Only call after ensureLoaded() succeeds\n     */\n    getDatabase(): any {\n        return require('better-sqlite3');\n    }\n}\n\n"
}
